meta.title: Prompt Anatomy – AI Operating System
meta.description: Learn to run AI like an operating system. Prompt engineering, automation and AI agents for real business results. Prompt Anatomy – AI Operating System.

whatIs.title: What is Prompt Anatomy
whatIs.valueLine1: Prompt Anatomy – a training system for working with AI.
whatIs.valueLine2: 6-block methodology, 500+ template library, and a guide to build GPTs, agents, and automations.

methodology.paragraph: Enough unpredictable results. Thinking chain per module: experience → check → practice.

items.title: Breakdown
items.desc: Deconstruct problems into structure that AI interprets reliably.

items.title: Engineering
items.desc: Layered construction using CoT (Chain of Thought) and Few-shot engineering.

items.title: Scale
items.desc: Integrates into workflows — apply the method and recover weekly time.

ecosystem.title: Choose your starting point
ecosystem.paragraph: From the first step to AI adoption across your team.
ecosystem.trustLine: Built for individuals, teams and AI rollout projects.

items.q: What do I get when I pay?
items.a: You get lifetime access to the modules in your plan, the interactive training app at promptanatomy.app/anatomy/, hands-on exercises, the 500+ prompt library, and a certificate when you pass from 70%. Starter covers modules 1–3; Core covers 1–6 including context engineering. Prompt Anatomy is the hub for checkout and training; ecosystem spokes (Cloud, library, marketing, HR, CEO, Pro) are free workflow tools that complement the course. Support is in our public Telegram group.

items.q: How do I access the training?
items.a: No password needed. From this site, go to the Pricing section, enter the email you used at checkout, tap Check, then Go to training — the app opens with a magic link. You can repeat the same steps anytime; your access is tied to that email, not a separate account.

Each plan includes the 6-block methodology, the prompt library, hands-on exercises, a certificate from 70%, and our public Telegram group. Starter gives modules 1–3 (prompt engineering and six business scenarios). Core adds modules 4–6, including context engineering, sprints, and projects — the full course. Ecosystem spokes (Enter on Cloud, Use on the library, Create, Hire, Manage, Deploy) are free tools for daily work and do not replace paid training.

Yes — we collect only what we need to run checkout and grant access. Payments are processed by Stripe; we never store full card numbers. We keep minimal purchase-related identifiers linked to your checkout email. Product analytics (PostHog, Vercel) and optional ad measurement may apply as described in our Privacy Policy, including across Prompt Anatomy ecosystem domains. Data is handled per EU and US security practices.

Primary support is our public Telegram group — link in the footer and shown after payment. It is where practitioners ask questions, share workflows, and get help with access. For billing, invoices, or refunds, email info@promptanatomy.app. Not sure where to start in the ecosystem? See the discovery map at promptanatomy.site/#ecosystem to choose a workflow by role.

No. Both Starter (39 EUR) and Core (99 EUR) are one-time payments with lifetime access — no subscription or expiry date. Once purchased, you keep access to your plan modules and can return to training anytime via the Pricing section magic-link flow.

items.q: What's the difference between Starter and Core?
items.a: Starter (39 EUR) covers modules 1–3: prompt engineering, the 6-block system, and six business scenarios — a solid entry point. Core (99 EUR) includes everything in Starter plus modules 4–6, context engineering, sprints, and projects — the full AI operating system course. Choose Starter to start lean; upgrade to Core later if you want the complete path. Both plans grant lifetime access.

See the Refunds section in our Terms of Service for conditions. Email info@promptanatomy.app from the address used at checkout and include your order details where possible. We aim to respond within fourteen (14) calendar days. Statutory consumer rights apply where required by law.

items.q: What languages are the trainings in?
items.a: Trainings are available in Lithuanian and English. The landing page, training app, and FAQ follow your selected locale (LT or EN). Switch language anytime from the navbar; your purchase works across both.

footer.tagline: Prompt Anatomy – a training system for working with AI.
footer.creator: creator: tomas staniulis

legal.privacyDescription: How Prompt Anatomy handles data: Stripe payments, product analytics (PostHog, Vercel), optional X ads measurement, cookies, and your rights.
legal.privacyIntro: These guidelines describe what data we process and why. For questions: info@promptanatomy.app.
legal.contactBody: Prompt Anatomy — mailing address (correspondence only, not a walk-in office): 1311 Park St, Unit #654, Alameda, CA 94501, US. Email: info@promptanatomy.app. For privacy, billing, refund, and support requests.
legal.privacyEcosystemNote: This policy applies across Prompt Anatomy ecosystem domains used to route users to the main product.
legal.privacyPrinciples: We follow EU and US security best practices and collect only what we need to run checkout, grant access to training, understand product usage, and maintain this website.
legal.privacyData: To grant and verify access we store minimal purchase-related identifiers (for example purchase or session IDs linked to the email used at Stripe Checkout). Stripe processes card payments; we do not store full card numbers. The email you enter for access checks may be processed to look up your entitlement.
legal.privacyAnalyticsBody: We use Vercel Web Analytics for aggregate traffic metrics. We use PostHog for product analytics; PostHog may use cookies and/or local storage as described in PostHog documentation. These services help us see which parts of the site work and improve the product.
legal.privacyAdvertisingBody: In production, we may load X (Twitter) conversion measurement code from X’s domain (including static.ads-twitter.com) when configured for our site. X may process data under its own terms as a separate controller or processor, depending on the feature.
legal.privacyCookiesTitle: Cookies, local storage, and similar technologies
legal.privacyCookiesBody: Besides PostHog (see above), we may store the email you used for access checks locally in your browser so you do not have to re-enter it (this is optional convenience storage, not a password account). You can clear site data in your browser settings at any time.
legal.privacyRights: Depending on your location you may have rights to access, correct, delete, object to, or restrict processing of personal data. To exercise these or ask questions, contact info@promptanatomy.app.
legal.termsDescription: Terms of service for Prompt Anatomy: EU sole proprietor, VAT, support, and refunds via info@promptanatomy.app.
legal.termsIntro: Short terms. For questions, contact us.
legal.termsEcosystemNote: These terms cover Prompt Anatomy ecosystem domains used for education, services, and routing to the main checkout flow.
legal.termsScope: Services are provided in the European Union. The provider operates under sole proprietor (individual activity) registration.
legal.termsInvoice: An invoice can be issued on request. Contact us.
legal.termsVat: VAT is included in the price.
legal.termsSupport: In case of payment issues we provide full support: access to content via GitHub, help via our public Telegram group.
legal.termsRefund: Refund requests: email info@promptanatomy.app from the address used at checkout and include your order details where possible. We aim to respond within fourteen (14) calendar days. Statutory consumer rights apply where required by law for your purchase. Where digital content has already been supplied with your prior consent and early performance rules apply, refunds may be limited—write to us and we will explain.

success.heading: Payment complete
success.body: Payment received. Your access is being set up. If you have any questions, please contact us.
success.emailDisclaimer: If you don't receive an email within a few minutes, check spam or contact us.
success.redirectError: Could not prepare the link. You can return home or contact us.
success.noSession: If you just paid – please wait, the system is preparing your access.
success.nextTime: Next time: promptanatomy.app → Pricing → enter email → Check → Go to training.

cancel.heading: Payment cancelled
cancel.body: Your payment was not completed. You can return anytime to purchase access to the Prompt Anatomy training.
